blocks.name: auth-sign-in-card
blocks.title: Auth Sign In Card

blocks.title: Auth Sign In Page
blocks.purpose: Next.js route composing sign-in-card + layout-kit

blocks.name: auth-sign-up-card
blocks.title: Auth Sign Up Card
blocks.purpose: Email+password registration form

blocks.name: auth-sign-up-page
blocks.title: Auth Sign Up Page
blocks.purpose: Next.js route composing sign-up-card + layout-kit

blocks.name: auth-forgot-password-card
blocks.title: Auth Forgot Password Card

blocks.name: auth-forgot-password-page
blocks.title: Auth Forgot Password Page
blocks.purpose: Next.js route composing forgot-password-card

blocks.name: auth-reset-password-card
blocks.title: Auth Reset Password Card

blocks.name: auth-reset-password-page
blocks.title: Auth Reset Password Page
blocks.purpose: Next.js route composing reset-password-card

blocks.name: auth-verify-email-page

blocks.title: Auth Verify Email Banner
blocks.purpose: Inline prompt to verify email; shows send-again action

blocks.name: auth-change-password-form
blocks.title: Auth Change Password Form
blocks.purpose: Current+new password form; step-up tier=medium gates submission

blocks.name: auth-sign-out-button
blocks.title: Auth Sign Out Button
blocks.purpose: Single sign-out button; ends the session and clears local cache

blocks.name: auth-anonymous-sign-in-button
blocks.title: Auth Anonymous Sign In Button
blocks.purpose: Single button; starts an anonymous guest session

blocks.name: auth-cross-origin-link
blocks.title: Auth Cross Origin Link
blocks.purpose: Cross-origin token exchange UI; redirects to another origin with a one-time token

blocks.name: auth-social-buttons

blocks.purpose: Dynamic OAuth provider buttons; queries identityProviders by default

blocks.name: auth-social-providers-grid
blocks.title: Auth Social Providers Grid
blocks.purpose: All enabled OAuth providers as a sign-in/sign-up grid; queries enabled identity providers

blocks.title: Auth Mfa Totp Challenge Page
blocks.purpose: Next.js route at /auth/mfa/totp; reads ?token= + ?redirect= and mounts the challenge card

blocks.title: Auth Passkey Sign In
blocks.purpose: WebAuthn passkey assertion for sign-in; override-driven verify path

blocks.name: auth-passkey-management-list
blocks.title: Auth Passkey Management List
blocks.purpose: Lists + renames + removes registered passkeys; step-up tier=high for delete

blocks.title: Auth Step Up Dialog
blocks.purpose: Shared step-up verifier (password or TOTP); used by sensitive blocks

blocks.name: use-step-up
blocks.title: Use Step Up
blocks.purpose: await stepUp({ tier: 'high' |'medium' }) imperative hook; wraps dialog trigger

blocks.name: auth-account-profile-card
blocks.title: Auth Account Profile Card
blocks.purpose: Display name + profile picture upload

blocks.name: auth-account-emails-list
blocks.title: Auth Account Emails List
blocks.purpose: Multi-email add/verify/set-primary/remove with resend verification

blocks.purpose: Password change + MFA status summary + passkeys overview

blocks.purpose: Lists user-scoped API keys with revoke and create-key actions

blocks.purpose: API key creation flow; step-up tier=high gates submission

blocks.title: Auth Account Deletion Confirm Page

ui.name: storage
ui.title: Storage Kit
ui.description: Shared foundation for the Storage kit — domain types, pure formatters, and the small stateless leaves the other storage blocks compose.

ui.name: storage-bucket-rail
ui.title: Storage Bucket Rail
ui.description: Vertical, scrollable list of buckets with visibility badges, object counts, and a pinned New bucket action. Stateless: selection is controlled.

ui.name: storage-object-table
ui.title: Storage Object Table
ui.description: The object browser table: controlled sort and selection, per-row actions, a skeleton loading state, and an empty-body message.

ui.name: storage-upload-dropzone
ui.title: Storage Upload Dropzone
ui.description: A presentational drag-and-drop target with a Browse button and an in-flight upload progress list. Upload behavior is delegated to the parent.

ui.name: storage-object-detail-sheet
ui.title: Storage Object Detail Sheet
ui.description: Right-side detail panel for a single object: image or file-type preview, a metadata list, inline rename, and primary actions with a confirmed delete.

ui.name: storage-bucket-config-sheet
ui.title: Storage Bucket Config Sheet
ui.description: Create or edit a bucket via a right-side Sheet form: key, visibility, custom-key/MIME/size/origin controls, and a description, gated to the host schema's real columns.

ui.name: storage-empty-state
ui.title: Storage Empty State
ui.description: Centered empty/zero states for the storage surface — no buckets, not provisioned, empty bucket, or no access — each with an icon, copy, and a primary action.

ui.name: storage-browser
ui.title: Storage Browser
ui.description: Master/detail page composition: a bucket rail on the left and an object browser on the right (header, toolbar, breadcrumb, table, and empty states). Composes the full storage kit.

ui.name: field
ui.title: Field
ui.description: Form field wrapper with label, description, and error message. Works standalone without any form library.

ui.name: form-kit
ui.title: Form Kit
ui.description: All form-related components: input, textarea, checkbox, radio, select, switch, progress, form controls.

ui.name: overlay-kit
ui.title: Overlay Kit
ui.description: All overlay components: dialog, sheet, drawer, popover, tooltip, dropdown menu, alert dialog.

ui.name: layout-kit
ui.title: Layout Kit
ui.description: Layout and navigation components: tabs, sidebar, collapsible, resizable panels, scroll area, breadcrumb, pagination.
